resources.string: Something went wrong. Please try again.
No internet connection. Please check your connection and try again.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
You don\'t have permission for this action.
The requested content was not found.
The payment could not be processed. Please try again.
Please enter a valid website (e.g. instagram.com).
The end time must be after the start time.
Please go back and pick a limit type.
Your payment was received, but the challenge could not be created. Please contact support.
If you exceed the limit, €%1$d will be charged immediately.
Updates from your group challenges — failures, completions and cancellations
A required permission has been missing for too long. Fix it now or your challenge will end automatically.
✅ Perfect! Your challenge is back on track.
Usage access permission is required to see your app stats.
Challenge started! The app is now blocked.
Finite needs a permission to protect you. Act now!
The longer you wait, the more you risk. Tap here to fix it.
Your challenge and your stake are at risk. Act now, before it\'s too late!
Your challenge will end automatically soon. Open Finite right away.
"Overlay + Accessibility are missing.\nYour money will be charged if you don\'t act right now!"
"The overlay permission was disabled.\nYour money is at risk if you don\'t act right now!"
"The Accessibility Service was disabled.\nYour money is at risk if you don\'t act right now!"
You are stronger than your phone.
Join my Finite Group Challenge! Code: %1$s
Your winnings will be transferred to your saved IBAN (1–2 business days).
Add your IBAN to receive your winnings.
⚠️ Connect your bank account to receive €%1$d
You already have an active challenge for “%1$s”. Finish it first.
Your payment was received, but the join could not be confirmed. Please try again.
Couldn\'t verify your challenges. Please try again.
You have an active Hard Mode challenge. Complete or cancel it before deleting your account.
Account deletion failed: %1$s Please sign in again and retry.
Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
You already have an active challenge for %1$s.
You already have an active group challenge for %1$s.
You created this challenge — you\'re already a participant!
You have already joined this challenge.
This challenge has already started or ended.
The join window for this challenge has closed.
You already have an active challenge for %1$s. You can\'t join this group challenge.
You already have an active challenge for %1$s. You can\'t create this group challenge.
Take control of your screen time. We need a few permissions to help you.
Finite needs to read your app usage to verify which apps you spend the most time on. This is the core of our Proof of Addiction system.
Finite shows a gentle reminder screen before you open tracked apps, helping you pause and decide if you really need to open them.

Detects which app is in the foreground and, in browsers, matches the currently open web address against your block lists — so the reminder or block screen can appear at the right moment. Addresses are discarded immediately; nothing is stored.
Before you continue — what the Accessibility Service does
Finite uses Android\'s Accessibility Service to provide its core feature: helping you control your screen time. The service accesses the following information:
Which app is currently in the foreground (only the app name/package name) — so Finite can show the reminder screen when you open a tracked app.

In browsers, additionally the currently open web address — only to match it against the block lists you set up yourself (e.g. blocked websites or adult content). This is the only way Finite can block a restricted page.

Your data stays on your device. Visited web addresses are processed only at the moment of matching and discarded immediately — they are not stored, not logged and not transmitted. Finite does not collect browsing history, does not read input, passwords or form content, and does not sell user data.
Finite sends you daily progress reports and gentle reminders to help you stay on track with your challenges.

Finite uses this service to detect which app you have just opened and, in browsers, to match the current web address against your own block lists. This allows a reminder or block screen to be shown at the right moment. Web addresses are processed only at the moment of matching and are not stored or transmitted.
Choose an app to start a challenge. Only apps with high usage are eligible.
Select one or more apps to track. Only apps with high usage are eligible.
Not enough usage in the last 14 days
Could not load usage data. Please make sure the Usage Data Access permission is granted.
Usage data permission is required to see your apps.
Adult Block is its own challenge
Adult Block only works as its own challenge. Your selected apps will be removed.
Adult Block only works as its own challenge. If you select an app, Adult Block will be turned off.
Must be below your average (%1$d min/day)
Please fix the highlighted fields before starting
The challenge could not be saved. Please check your internet connection and try again. Your payment is safe.
You already have an active Adult Block challenge.
%1$s: choose your session duration each time, up to %2$d min/day total
Why are you doing this? Write something to remind yourself\u2026
No active challenges yet. Start one to take control of your screen time!
Take control of your screen time and build better habits.
All 18+ websites blocked — around the clock
You\'ve reached your daily limit. Come back tomorrow.
Your daily detox summary and points
Notifications for completed or failed challenges
You exceeded the limit for %1$s (Hard Mode).
Daily progress reminders and usage warnings
Don\'t forget to check your progress today
You\'ve used 80%% of your daily limit. Stay strong!
You stayed within your %1$s limit today!
Email sent. Check your spam folder too.
No account found for this email
Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.
This email is already registered. Please sign in.
Please verify your email address first.
I accept the Terms of Service
I am at least 18 years old
We sent a verification email to %1$s. Please click the link in the email.
Email not verified yet. Please check your inbox (and spam).
This name is unique and can\'t be changed later.
Real money will be charged if you break your limit. 50%% goes to charity.
This will end the challenge without awarding points. You cannot undo this.
If you quit, you lose €%.2f immediately. Are you sure?
Your stake could not be charged. The challenge is still active. Please check your internet connection and try again.
Your daily limit is used up. Your stake will now be charged and the app is blocked for today.
You exceeded your limit for %1$s. The app is locked until midnight.
Evaluation queued — check Logcat for results
This will sign you out and clear your local data.
Connect your bank account to receive winnings
€%1$d has been transferred to your bank account!
€%1$d has been transferred to your bank account!
No challenges yet. Tap + to start one!
Could not redeem reward. Try again.
Switch the app to a vivid dark neon look
Get +15 minutes extra today without losing points
Change the Finite app icon on your home screen
Show off a special badge on your profile
Your end-of-day summary of points and challenges
You earned %1$d pts today. %2$d/%3$d challenges on track 🎯
Alerts when a challenge is completed or failed
You successfully completed your %1$s challenge. Well done!
Your %1$s challenge has ended. Don\'t give up — start a new one!
Do you really want to open this app?
You have reached your limit for today.
Do you still want to continue?
You will lose all points for today.
€%.2f will be captured from your card.
Yes, I accept — lose the challenge
Yes, I accept — charge my card
Your challenge will be marked as failed.
Over on day one — that happens. The next attempt counts.
Want to start a new challenge?
No challenges yet. Start one from the dashboard!
Only accessible during scheduled hours — no usage limit applies
Set a start and end time above
Adult content is always fully blocked — no time limits
No known domains detected for selected apps. Add domains manually below.
Only enforce this challenge during specific hours and days.
What do you want to reduce?
Limit or block a specific app on your phone
Block specific websites in your browser
Add domains you want to block in your browser during this challenge.
Create a challenge or join one!
Start Date (must be tomorrow or later)
The participant with the best performance (fewest opens / most time saved) receives an extra 10%% of the total pot. The app takes a 5%% fee.
Share this code with your friends so they can join!
Join my Finite challenge! Code: %1$s — App: %2$s, %3$d days, min €%4$d
Enter the 6-character code the creator shared with you.
Challenge won! 💚 €%1$d is being refunded. (20%% app fee: €%2$d)
You held out for %1$d days. Consciously, not on reflex.
💪 In 24 hrs you can start a comeback challenge and win part of it back.
You used the blocked app despite the block.
Your €%1$d has been refunded to your card
You can try again — stronger than before.
Finite needs VPN permission to block websites. Your data never leaves your device — the VPN only filters DNS requests locally.
Finite uses a local VPN to block distracting and adult websites. Your data never leaves your device — this VPN only filters DNS requests.
Website blocking will not work without this permission
To prevent your device from stopping website blocking, please disable battery optimization for Finite. Look for "App launch" or "Protected apps" in Power settings.
Local VPN active — your data stays on this device
Share this code with friends so they can join!
%1$s exceeded their limit in the %2$s challenge. Stay strong!
Not enough players joined the %1$s challenge. Your buy-in will be refunded.
You completed the %1$s group challenge! €%2$d is being refunded.
The %1$s group challenge has ended. Better luck next time!
Your group challenge hasn\'t started yet
Tap to start when everyone has joined
End time must be after start time
A link will be sent to your email
All data will be permanently deleted
All challenges and data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
An email was sent to %1$s. Check your spam folder too.
Please enter your password to continue.
Notification when a group member exceeds the limit
Permanently delete account and all data
€%1$d will be charged. This action cannot be undone.
18 hours left — enable the permission to protect your stake.
12 hours left until your stake is charged automatically.
💸 Your stake will be charged in 1 hour
Enable the permission now — or you\'ll lose your stake.
Open the app to keep your challenge running — otherwise it counts as abandoned and your stake may be lost.
Your challenge can no longer block apps. Tap to fix it.
Your challenge can block apps again.
Huawei: Settings → Apps → Finite → Auto-launch → Enable
A new version of Finite is available. Please update the app to continue.
Finite is under maintenance. We\'ll be back for you shortly.
Your account has been suspended. If you have questions, contact support.
We reply by email within 48 hours.
Please describe your issue (at least 10 characters).

In Hard Mode you put down an amount of money as your stake. If you see your challenge through, you get your money back. If you quit or disable the required permissions, your stake is charged. That keeps the incentive high to really stick with it.
What happens if I disable the permission?

If you disable the overlay or accessibility permission during an active Hard Mode challenge, the app treats that as quitting. Your stake may then be charged. Keep the permissions enabled until the challenge ends.
How do I get my money back?
After successfully completing a Hard Mode challenge, your stake is released for payout. Add your IBAN in Settings for this. The payout is then transferred to your bank account.
No. Once assigned, your username is permanent and cannot be changed. So choose it carefully when signing up.
In a group challenge you take on screen time together. All participants pay a stake into a pool. Those who hold out share the pool of the participants who didn\'t make it.
How do I delete my account?
Go to the very bottom of Settings and tap “Delete account”. This irrevocably removes all your data. You should finish any running Hard Mode challenges first.
You aren\'t seeing ads. Finite is completely ad-free and is funded solely by the fees from Hard Mode challenges. If you do see ads, please contact support.

First check that all permissions (overlay and accessibility) are enabled. On Huawei devices you also need to exempt Finite from battery optimization and allow auto-launch: Settings → Apps → Finite → Battery → Enable auto-launch.
If you disable the overlay or accessibility permission, the app can no longer reliably block apps. Keep the permissions enabled until the end of your challenge so everything works as intended.
Go to the very bottom of Settings and tap “Delete account”. This irrevocably removes all your data.
You aren\'t seeing ads. Finite is completely ad-free. If you do see ads, please contact support.
Average daily screen time in Germany
That\'s 63 days a year. Ready to change that?
How often you unlock your phone every day
Lifetime wasted on your phone every year
Finite helps you spend your time more consciously.
No more mindless scrolling. Finite makes every app open a conscious one.
Before the app starts, you get a brief moment to stop.
Every successful day extends your streak.
Three ways to spend less time on your phone.
Here\'s how your path to less screen time works.
Without these permissions, Finite can\'t block any apps.
Shows the block screen over apps
Your data stays on your device. Finite doesn\'t sell user data.
Please disable battery optimization for Finite so the app can run in the background: Settings → Apps → Finite → Battery → No restrictions
Create your first challenge and start your digital reset.
Block one app of your choice
IBAN saved. Payout is being processed.
Prize share is transferred once your IBAN is added
You have a chance to win back €%1$d
You can win back €%1$d of your €%2$d. Start your comeback challenge now!
€%1$d is being refunded to your card. Well done!
Unfortunately no refund is possible for %1$s. You gave it everything!
You\'ve reached your daily limit of %1$d opens.
Give up the challenge from the Dashboard only
How long do you want to watch?
This website is blocked in your challenge.
18+ content is blocked by your active challenge.
💳 Your money is held safely until the challenge ends
Share this code with your friends!
✅ Payout requested — transferred within 3–5 business days
Add your IBAN in Settings to request your money.
Your prize share is ready. Open the app to request the payout.
Prize share pending — open the app
Prize share pending — request the payout in the app
The payment from %s is no longer valid. Please remove this participant or wait for a new payment.
Your stake of %1$s will be fully refunded.
All %1$d participants will get their stake fully refunded.
You left the challenge. €%1$d is being refunded.
The creator deleted the challenge. Your stake will be fully refunded.
The group challenge wasn\'t started in time. Your money has been fully refunded.
Your group challenge expires tomorrow. Start it now or all participants get their money back.
Applies from tomorrow · Can\'t be increased again
⚠️ This change is permanent and cannot be undone.
Your limit will be permanently reduced to %1$d %2$s tomorrow. This change cannot be undone.
How serious do you want to get?
Build habits with streaks. No money involved.
Real money at stake. Serious commitment.
How do you want to restrict yourself?
Block after X minutes per day.
Block after X conscious opens per day.
Split your available time across the day.
Restrict tracking to specific hours and days — or skip this step.
Usage access is required to start a challenge. Please enable it in settings and try again.
For your challenge to actually block anything, the following permissions are still missing. Grant them, then tap “Start challenge” again.
You\'ll see these words every time you try to open the app.
For groups with no losers: 100%% back
I agree that the challenge starts immediately and that I thereby waive my right of withdrawal under § 18 FAGG.
If you uninstall or disable the app during an active challenge, you lose your stake.
How should the group be restricted?
How much does each player pay to take part?
The challenge starts manually — tap “Start challenge” once everyone has joined.
The best participant gets an extra 10%% from the pot. The app takes a 5%% fee.
The participant with the best performance gets an extra 10%% from the pot. The app takes a 5%% fee.
Accessibility Service disabled — your challenge is not protected.
Overlay permission missing — block screens can\'t be shown.
Permissions missing — your challenge is not protected.
You used %1$s even though the permission is missing. Your stake is at risk.
Your device appears to be modified. This can affect the reliability of blocking. Your stake can still be charged for violations.
Too few players. All stakes are being refunded.
All %1$d participants stayed within the limit. Stakes are being refunded!
Your bonus (€%1$d) will be transferred to your bank account
The overlay permission was disabled for too long. Your stake has been charged.
